name: Forest
description: Deep forest ambiance with rustling organic layers

prompts.SessionStart: warm ascending marimba notes climbing a major scale, wooden mallet percussion, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.SessionEnd: descending marimba notes with wooden warmth and smooth decay, wooden mallet percussion, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.Stop: single bright marimba strike with satisfying wooden ring and sustain, wooden mallet percussion, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.PreToolUse: quick woodblock click with crisp short tap, wooden percussion, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.PostToolUse: short xylophone ping confirming with bright wooden tone, wooden mallet percussion, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.PermissionPrompt: two marimba notes with questioning rising interval, wooden mallet percussion, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.IdlePrompt: steady marimba pulse with warm rhythmic wooden tapping, wooden mallet percussion, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.SubagentStart: marimba tone branching into two notes played simultaneously, wooden mallet percussion, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.SubagentStop: clear marimba ping returning with distinct wooden tap, wooden mallet percussion, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
prompts.UserPromptSubmit: bright energetic marimba roll with ascending wooden tones, wooden mallet percussion, nature notification sound, clean, clear, no background noise, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, warm
